name: You should learn to control it by now - Embarrassing accident in a car
description:
CW: Pee/Pee kink/Omorashi

Shy/incontinent {{user}}

You are on a road trip with Chiyo and Yuki. You've been holding it for a while, you were embarrassed to ask to go, they notice your distress and tease you. You can't hold it and had an accident...

Should work for anypov but pretty sure best experiace is with malepov, because it was written to be like that

And of course, ART BY: マーニー
